desc: Alarm with manual reset.

name: Advanced operations

desc: Performs an addition of all inputs.

name: / DIV
desc: Performs a division of inputs.

desc: Calculation of modulo.

desc: Test if an integer is odd.

name: - SUB
desc: Performs a subtraction of inputs.

desc: Performs a logical AND of all inputs.

desc: Outputs a pulse at the rising edge of the input ‘xExecute’.

desc: Force a Boolean output to FALSE.

desc: Rising pulse detection.

desc: Semaphore.

desc: Set dominant bistable.

desc: Comparison with detailed outputs for integer inputs.

desc: Test if first input is greater than second input.

name: <= LE
desc: Test if first input is less than or equal to second input.

name: < LT
desc: Test if first input is less than second input.

name: <> NE
desc: Test if first input is not equal to second input.
